text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Well, as a wise man once said...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
If the fish aren't biting, they're just giving you
time to think instead.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Pretty cool, right? I really was able to get some
decent pondering done.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Different lures, different casting spots—I came up
with all kinds of tactics. It was real fun.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Still, where's the thrill in setting a trap if nothing takes the bait?
